content: Just as language learners build long-term retention and accurate usage by explicitly pausing to reflect on their writing errors after drafting, large language models can combine the dynamic episodic memory of Reflexion agents with the iterative output improvement pipeline of Self-Refine to avoid repeating the same structural or logical mistakes across unrelated tasks over time. This creates a hybrid system that outperforms either standalone method by tying short-term output refinement to long-term memory updating.
